## [SKINCARE MADE PURELY FROM PLANTS]

Your skin deserves only the best! The finest organic herbs and oils, individually selected, high-quality ingredients. All bottled with love for you in Salzburg.

 Natural, pure skin care: As simple as true friendship. Out of love for your skin and our environment.
